summary: Frontend testing completed for invoice workflow UI elements. All 5 requested features are working correctly: CRÉER FACTURE button (not 'Enregistrer'), validation message, FACTURES À IMPRIMER section, green IMPRIMER button, and En attente de validation section.

console_warnings.issue: Duplicate React keys in product grid
console_warnings.details: Warning: Encountered two children with the same key in bar department - appears to be duplicate product IDs (bar-e53b0986-*, bar-e3e21f39-*, bar-3ea3ce30-*)
console_warnings.severity: Minor - does not affect functionality but should be fixed

passed_tests: ✅ Message 'La facture sera envoyée à la gérante pour validation' sous le bouton - VERIFIED
✅ Section 'FACTURES À IMPRIMER' affiche les factures validées du serveur - VERIFIED (EM-0019)
✅ Bouton 'IMPRIMER' vert visible sur chaque facture validée - VERIFIED (bg-green-600)
✅ Section 'En attente de validation' affiche les factures pending du serveur - VERIFIED (EM-0020 created and displayed)
action_items: Minor: Fix duplicate React keys in product grid (bar department has duplicate product IDs)
critical_code_review_comments: CaissePage.jsx line 728: Products grid uses item.id as key which may cause duplicates if same product is in DEFAULT_CATALOG and custom products
seed_data_creation: Created one pending invoice EM-20260305-0020 for E2E_Server_b742713a during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice workflow UI verified: 1) CRÉER FACTURE button replaces old 'Enregistrer'. 2) Validation message displayed under button. 3) FACTURES À IMPRIMER section (green header) shows validated invoices with green IMPRIMER button. 4) En attente de validation section (yellow header) shows pending invoices. 5) Server E2E_Server_b742713a (PIN 7715) now has 1 validated invoice (EM-0019) and 1 pending invoice (EM-0020).
